notes: Redis is a key-value/JSON store with no vendor REST API, so this OpenAPI document is synthesized from the adaptor surface (ast.json). Each of the 10 public adaptor operations is modelled as a POST path: get, hget, jGet, mGet, hGetAll (reads) and set, hset, jSet, mSet, scan (writes/scan). Request schemas mirror the operation params; response schemas wrap the returned value under a `data` field to match how the adaptor writes results onto OpenFn state. Common/utility exports (fn, each, field, cursor, etc.) are intentionally excluded as they are not external calls. Server URL is a mock placeholder; there is no real HTTP endpoint.
